title.en: PF Withdrawal Stuck or Rejected? KYC Fixes, Claim Routes and EPFO Grievances

answerBox.en: Most PF claim rejections trace to fixable mismatches — name/DOB differing across Aadhaar, PAN and the UAN, unverified KYC, or the employer not approving your details. Fix the data (joint declaration for member-detail corrections), file the right claim form online (19/10C/31), and if it still sticks, escalate on EPFO's EPFiGMS grievance portal and to the Regional PF Commissioner. Interest accrues even on inoperative accounts.

en.label: TDS threshold
en.startsFrom: withdrawals before it may face TDS

en.title: Fix the data before you file
en.summary: Name/DOB/Aadhaar/bank must match to the letter.
en.detail: On the **[UAN member portal](https://unifiedportal-mem.epfindia.gov.in)**: seed and verify **Aadhaar, PAN and bank** (KYC tab), and compare your name/DOB/father's name against Aadhaar exactly — mismatches are the top rejection cause. Corrections use the **joint declaration** process (online now): you request, employer verifies, EPFO approves. Multiple UANs from job changes? **Transfer old accounts into the current UAN** (One Member One EPF option) before any withdrawal.

en.title: File the right claim, the right way
en.detail: Online claims (Aadhaar-OTP signed): **Form 19** — final PF settlement (after 2 months of unemployment post-exit; **exit date must be marked** by the employer or by you via the portal after cooling period); **Form 10C** — EPS pension withdrawal benefit (under 10 years of service) or scheme certificate; **Form 31** — partial advances (illness, marriage, education, housing) while employed. Cheque leaf/passbook upload with visible IFSC + name is the small hurdle that bounces many claims — photograph it properly.

en.title: When it sticks: the escalation ladder
en.summary: EPFiGMS → RPFC → CPGRAMS; employer defaults have teeth.
en.detail: Rejected with a vague reason or pending beyond ~20 days: file on **[EPFiGMS](https://epfigms.gov.in)** with your claim ID (grievances route to the exact field office and generate accountability); escalate unresolved grievances to the **Regional PF Commissioner** in writing and via **CPGRAMS**. If the **employer deducted PF but never deposited** it: that is a criminal default — EPFO recovers with damages (Section 14B) and prosecutes; report it specifically, with salary slips showing deductions. RTI applications ([guide](/help/government-paperwork/rti-application-how-to)) extract the file status when portals go quiet.

en.title: Know the money rules
en.summary: Taxability, interest continuation, and the pension fork.
en.detail: Withdrawals after **5 years of continuous service** (including transferred service) are tax-free; earlier withdrawals face **TDS** (10% with PAN; higher without) subject to thresholds — transfers, not withdrawals, preserve continuity when switching jobs. Accounts keep **earning interest** even after you leave (till closure/retirement age limits). EPS: under 10 years — withdraw via 10C or take a **scheme certificate**; 10+ years locks you into pension at 58 — a fork worth a ₹299 consult if you're near the boundary.

en.footnote: Never pay "PF agents" a percentage to withdraw your own money — every step is free and online; the agents just do the KYC fixes this page teaches.

en.q: My claim was rejected saying "name mismatch with Aadhaar". What exactly do I do?
en.a: File the online joint declaration from the member portal choosing the fields to correct (name/DOB as per Aadhaar), upload Aadhaar; the employer approves digitally, then EPFO. Post-approval, re-file the claim. Ex-employer defunct? EPFO field offices process declarations with alternate verification — a grievance plus documentation gets it moving.

en.q: My old company never marked my exit date, so I can't claim. Fix?
en.a: You can mark your own exit date on the portal (Manage → Mark Exit) once 2 months pass since the last contribution, using the last month's contribution date. No employer cooperation needed. Then file 19/10C.

en.q: Employer cut PF from salary but EPFO passbook shows nothing. What now?
en.a: That is misappropriation: complain to EPFO (EPFiGMS + written complaint to the RPFC naming months and amounts, with salary slips) — EPFO assesses (7A), recovers with interest and damages, and prosecutes. A criminal breach-of-trust angle also exists. Group complaints from colleagues accelerate everything.

en.q: Should I withdraw or transfer PF when changing jobs?
en.a: Transfer, almost always: continuity preserves the 5-year tax clock, keeps interest compounding, and maintains EPS service history toward pension. Withdraw only in genuine need or emigration-type exits. The portal's transfer claim (Form 13 flow) is straightforward once KYC is clean.

en.q: How long until money actually hits my bank?
en.a: Clean Aadhaar-based claims commonly settle in 3–20 days. The distribution: KYC-clean claims are fast; anything with mismatches, unverified bank, or employer-approval dependencies queues until fixed — which is why step one of this guide is the data, not the claim.

reviewer: Adv. Arjun Nair, Bar Council of Kerala, KER/0973/2012
author: WakilBhai Editorial Team
